title: schoenus subaphyllus var. kennyi
intro: Schoenus subaphyllus var. kennyi, also known as the black sedge, is a plant species that belongs to the sedge family, Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the black sedge has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve coughs, and soothe respiratory tract irritations. Schoenus subaphyllus var. kennyi can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for its herbal remedies, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
